mapper.select: SELECT category_id, category_name, description, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM categories WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY display_order ASC, category_name ASC
SELECT category_id, category_name, description, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM categories WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET category_name = #{categoryName}, description = #{description}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
UPDATE categories SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
